title: Spring Breakup in Alaska
summary: High Drama When the River Runs Again by Beth Grassi In late April 2014, I stood on a bridge in Fairbanks watching the Chena River waking up under my feet. title: ProvaSlim Reviews – Safe Ingredients for Customer Results or Fake Weight Loss Hype?

title: KUAC is leaving Twitter
summary: Due to recent changes in Twitter’s policies regarding public media in the US and elsewhere, we here at KUAC have decided to pause use of our Twitter account for the foreseeable future. You can still find updates on station programming and news on our Facebook page , and here at KUAC.org.

title: Regional Advocacy Strengthened with Kawerak’s NPFMC Testimony Workshop
summary: From April 5-9, Kawerak, in partnership with the University of Alaska Fairbanks and the First Nations Development Institute, hosted a testimony drafting workshop for tribal members to testify before the North Pacific Fishery Management Council (NPFMC). Attendees took part in a 5 day workshop covering topics such as the structure and operation of the NPFMC, the scope of the Council’s management, Tribal issues, bycatch issues, as well as h...
